shots.title: Hikari Riverside release overview
shots.composition: sidebar plus spacious dashboard grid with press-block page title, four stat cards, progress bars, and venue queue

scene.headline: Hikari Riverside is 61 percent ready
scene.description: Coordinate the koinobori family sets, wind window, venue approvals, and sponsor captions before public lift.

shots.title: Venue release editor
shots.composition: large cool air sheet with form fields on the left and generated kit imagery on the right
mustShowStates: hot action quieter than primary unless singular

scene.headline: Aoba River Walk install details
scene.description: Set the venue lead, wind decision, pole spacing note, and public-page switch before sending the release to partners.

fields.label: Install note
fields.value: Confirm bridge rail clearance before lifting the parent carp.

shots.title: Proof and hold queue
shots.composition: dense operational rows on cool surface, highlighter bars for readiness, black press block for the urgent wind hold

scene.headline: Two textile proofs remain before the wind call
scene.description: Operations stay adult and crisp while retaining early-summer lift through white air and highlighter status.
